DEMURRER
Off Calendar Apr-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Cliff Weingus, Esq. 777-0313 for pltf & opposing party; Elizabeth K. Ryan, Esq. 510/832-8134 for deft & moving party CHW Bay Area dba St. Mary's Medical Center.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer as to intentional infliction of emotional distress sustained without leave to amend; demurrer as to willful misconduct sustained without leave to amend.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Prevailing party to prepare order.

RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike attorneys fees granted.
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Prevailing party to prepare order.
